name: GrowVault AI Savings Advisor
description: Autonomous AI agent on Celo that monitors on-chain savings goals every 5 minutes. Uses Groq/Llama AI to identify goals within 2 cUSD of a milestone (25/50/75/100%), then autonomously approves cUSD and executes on-chain deposit boosts — no human action required. Built for MiniPay users in sub-Saharan Africa saving toward real goals.
